name: List Comments
description: Deliberately unauthenticated (no `auth.jwt` middleware, must not 401 anonymously). Noda has no in-workflow JWT decode/verify node (only `util.jwt_sign` exists), so the caller's identity cannot be recovered here without the hard-401'ing `auth.jwt` middleware; the viewer id passed to the `following` subquery is therefore always the literal empty string, making every comment's `author.following` always false. Documented gap, same pattern as get-article/get-profile/list-articles (see task-3/task-4/task-5 reports, noda-limitation).

config.query: SELECT id FROM articles WHERE slug = $1

SELECT c.id, c.body, c.created_at, c.updated_at, u.metadata->>'username' AS username, u.metadata->>'bio' AS bio, u.metadata->>'image' AS image, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM follows fo WHERE fo.follower_id = $2 AND fo.followee_id = c.author_id) AS following FROM comments c JOIN auth_users u ON u.id = c.author_id WHERE c.article_id = $1 ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
